diagrams.title: Daemon Creation Process Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the step-by-step flow of creating a daemon process using fork() and setsid()
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the complete daemon creation procedure and understand each step's role

diagrams.title: Process Hierarchy Tree
diagrams.description: Hierarchical tree showing parent-child relationships between init, daemons, and regular processes
diagrams.purpose: Understand how daemons relate to init process and how orphaned processes are adopted

diagrams.title: Inetd/Xinetd vs Standalone Daemon Architecture
diagrams.description: Comparison diagram showing how inetd-based and standalone daemons handle incoming connections differently
diagrams.purpose: Compare the two daemon models and understand when each is appropriate
